passage.title: Exploring Deep Seas
passage.text: Much of the ocean is still unexplored. Scientists use robotic submarines to travel where humans cannot. In the deep sea, sunlight does not reach the water, and many creatures produce their own light through a process called bioluminescence. These discoveries help researchers learn how life adapts to extreme environments.

questions.question: What does 'bioluminescence' mean in this passage?
Why does the author mention robotic submarines?
questions.answer_guidance: To explain how scientists can explore areas humans cannot reach.
